name: OmniMemory
description: OmniMemory-backed memory slot plugin for OpenClaw.

autoCapture.label: Auto Capture
autoCapture.help: Write recent conversation turns back to OmniMemory

recallScope.label: Recall Scope
recallScope.help: Choose whether memory_search reads across the whole account, one agent namespace, or only the current session

ingestScope.label: Ingest Scope
ingestScope.help: Choose which scope receives captured conversation turns

captureStrategy.label: Capture Strategy
captureStrategy.help: Choose whether to write the last turn or the full normalized session

suppressLocalMemoryBootstrap.label: Suppress Local Memory Bootstrap
suppressLocalMemoryBootstrap.help: When replacement patch is applied, suppress local MEMORY.md and memory/*.md bootstrap injection
